theme.en: AI Demand Forces Supply Chain Decisions

dek.en: Governments, foundries, memory buyers, and chip vendors are responding to AI demand with bigger investment plans, tighter sourcing choices, and consolidation. The day’s through-line is less about new product launches than about who can secure capacity, materials, and policy clearance.
dek.zh: 政府、晶圆代工厂、存储买家和芯片厂商都在围绕AI需求扩大投资、调整采购并推动整合。今天的主线不是单一新品发布，而是谁能锁定产能、材料和政策通道。

title.en: AI & Accelerators
title.zh: AI与加速器

title.en: Marvell Jumps as KeyBanc Lifts Its AI Networking Outlook
title.zh: KeyBanc上调AI网络前景，Marvell股价跳涨

summary.en: Marvell shares reportedly rose 14% after KeyBanc lifted its AI networking outlook and raised the company’s price target. The move keeps optical, switching, and custom connectivity silicon in focus as AI clusters shift bottlenecks from compute alone to scale-out networking.
summary.zh: 报道称，在KeyBanc上调AI网络业务前景并提高Marvell目标价后，Marvell股价上涨14%。这让光互连、交换芯片和定制连接芯片继续成为焦点，因为AI集群的瓶颈正从单纯算力扩展到横向扩展网络。

title.en: Foundry & Manufacturing
title.zh: 晶圆代工与制造

title.en: TSMC Posts 30% Revenue Surge as AI Chip Demand Holds
title.zh: AI芯片需求延续，台积电收入增长30%

summary.en: TSMC reportedly posted a 30% revenue surge, with AI chip demand still driving leading-edge foundry utilization. The result matters because advanced-node capacity remains the base layer for Nvidia, AMD, custom ASICs, and high-end networking chips, so revenue momentum also signals pressure on packaging and upstream equipment.
summary.zh: 报道称，在AI芯片需求支撑下，台积电收入增长30%，先进制程产能利用率继续受益。其重要性在于，先进节点产能仍是Nvidia、AMD、定制ASIC和高端网络芯片的基础，收入动能也会继续传导到先进封装和上游设备。

title.en: Memory
title.zh: 存储

title.en: Taiwan Joins the Post-HBM Memory Race With Intel and SoftBank
title.zh: 台湾携手Intel与SoftBank加入后HBM存储竞赛

summary.en: DigiTimes reports that Taiwan is joining a post-HBM memory race involving Intel and SoftBank. The framing points to a broader search for memory architectures beyond today’s HBM supply chain as AI systems become increasingly limited by bandwidth, capacity, and packaging constraints.
summary.zh: DigiTimes报道称，台湾正加入一场涉及Intel和SoftBank的后HBM存储竞赛。这显示业界正在现有HBM供应链之外寻找新的存储架构，因为AI系统越来越受带宽、容量和封装约束限制。

title.en: Apple Looks to CXMT DRAM as Shortage Risk Rises
title.zh: DRAM短缺风险上升，Apple转向评估CXMT

summary.en: Wccftech reports that Apple’s possible iPhone 18 DRAM sourcing from CXMT would not solve pricing or supply tightness outright, according to an analyst, but could reduce shortage risk. The story matters because AI server demand is pulling DRAM supply away from consumer electronics, forcing large device makers to consider politically sensitive suppliers.
summary.zh: Wccftech报道称，分析师认为Apple为iPhone 18评估从CXMT采购DRAM，并不能直接解决价格或供给紧张问题，但可以降低断供风险。这件事重要在于，AI服务器需求正在挤占消费电子的DRAM供给，迫使大型终端厂商考虑政治上更敏感的供应商。

title.en: Equipment & Materials
title.zh: 设备与材料

title.en: High-Purity CO2 Supply Tightens for Advanced Chip Cleaning
title.zh: 先进半导体清洗用高纯CO2供应趋紧

summary.en: The Elec reports that high-purity CO2 supply is tightening for advanced semiconductor cleaning. Specialty gases and cleaning materials rarely dominate headlines, but shortages can disrupt fab qualification schedules and raise operating risk for advanced process flows.
summary.zh: The Elec报道称，用于先进半导体清洗的高纯CO2供应正在趋紧。特种气体和清洗材料通常不占据头条，但短缺可能扰动晶圆厂认证进度，并提高先进工艺流程的运营风险。

title.en: ASML Denies Selling an EUV Tool to China After US Concern
title.zh: 美国关注相关报道后，ASML否认向中国出售EUV设备

summary.en: Insider Monkey reports that ASML denied selling an EUV chipmaking tool to China after a report of US concern. The denial keeps export-control scrutiny centered on the lithography stack, where even rumors around EUV access can affect expectations for China’s leading-edge manufacturing path.
summary.zh: Insider Monkey报道称，在有关美国担忧的报道出现后，ASML否认向中国出售EUV芯片制造设备。这一否认让出口管制焦点继续集中在光刻环节，因为即便是有关EUV准入的传闻，也会影响外界对中国先进制造路径的判断。

title.en: Policy & Geopolitics
title.zh: 政策与地缘政治

title.en: South Korea Prepares a Reported $649 Billion Chip and AI Plan
title.zh: 韩国拟推出6490亿美元芯片与AI投资计划

summary.en: UPI reports that South Korea is preparing to unveil a chip and AI investment plan valued at a reported $649 billion. The scale shows Seoul treating semiconductors and AI infrastructure as a linked industrial-policy problem, not as separate fab, memory, and software programs.
summary.zh: UPI报道称，韩国准备公布一项据称规模达6490亿美元的芯片与AI投资计划。这个规模表明，首尔正把半导体和AI基础设施视为一个相互绑定的产业政策问题，而不是彼此分离的晶圆厂、存储和软件项目。

title.en: Earnings & Markets
title.zh: 财报与市场

title.en: onsemi Plans $7 Billion All-Stock Acquisition of Synaptics
title.zh: onsemi拟以70亿美元全股票交易收购Synaptics

summary.en: The Elec reports that onsemi plans to acquire Synaptics in a $7 billion all-stock deal. The transaction would combine onsemi’s power and sensing footprint with Synaptics’ edge, connectivity, and interface silicon, extending consolidation pressure beyond headline AI accelerator vendors.
summary.zh: The Elec报道称，onsemi计划以70亿美元全股票交易收购Synaptics。这笔交易将把onsemi在功率和传感领域的布局，与Synaptics的边缘、连接和接口芯片结合起来，显示整合压力正在从头部AI加速器厂商外溢到更广的芯片市场。

title.en: BASiC Semiconductor Seeks Up to HK$865.95 Million in Hong Kong IPO
title.zh: BASiC Semiconductor拟在港IPO募资最多8.6595亿港元

summary.en: Moomoo reports that BASiC Semiconductor plans to raise up to HK$865.95 million in a Hong Kong IPO. The listing would add another power-semiconductor name to public markets at a time when electrification, industrial drives, and data-center power delivery are drawing more investor attention.
summary.zh: Moomoo报道称，BASiC Semiconductor计划在香港IPO中募资最多8.6595亿港元。在电动化、工业驱动和数据中心供电吸引更多资本关注之际，这一上市将为公开市场增加一家功率半导体公司。

title.en: Challengers
title.zh: 挑战者公司

title.en: SambaNova Reportedly Seeks a $10 Billion Valuation
title.zh: SambaNova据称寻求100亿美元估值

summary.en: HarianBasis.co reports that SambaNova Systems is seeking a $10 billion valuation as it competes with Nvidia. The number shows that private AI-chip and full-stack AI vendors can still command large funding ambitions, even as the market increasingly asks whether challengers can turn specialized architectures into durable deployments.
summary.zh: HarianBasis.co报道称，SambaNova Systems在与Nvidia竞争的过程中寻求100亿美元估值。这个数字说明，私有AI芯片和全栈AI厂商仍有很高融资目标，但市场也越来越关注这些挑战者能否把专用架构转化为持续部署。

title.en: SemiFive Records Its First Overseas Mass-Production Revenue
title.zh: SemiFive录得首笔海外量产收入

summary.en: The Elec reports that SemiFive recorded its first overseas mass-production revenue. For a design-platform and ASIC services player, overseas mass production is a stronger commercial signal than a design win because it suggests customer silicon has moved into revenue-generating volume.
summary.zh: The Elec报道称，SemiFive录得首笔海外量产收入。对设计平台和ASIC服务公司来说，海外量产比单纯设计中标更能说明商业进展，因为这意味着客户芯片已经进入可产生收入的规模化阶段。

theme.zh: 高效硬件遇上可靠性压力

dek.en: Today’s research shortlist is architecture-heavy, with emphasis on low-power acceleration, fault screening, security co-processors, and AI-assisted design. The common thread is practical deployment pressure: energy, reliability, and verification matter as much as peak throughput.
dek.zh: 今天的研究入选偏重架构方向，重点包括低功耗加速、故障筛选、安全协处理器和AI辅助设计。共同主线是实际部署压力：能效、可靠性和验证的重要性不低于峰值吞吐。

title.en: Circuits & Architecture
title.zh: 电路与架构

title.en: VLSI Implementation of an Energy-Efficient Approximate ALU
title.zh: 面向能效的近似ALU VLSI实现

papers.authors: Tamilselvi P., Jeyasudha S., Ranjitha R., Sanmugapriya M., Neethu K., et al.
papers.venue: International Research Journal on Advanced Engineering Hub (IRJAEH)

summary.en: The paper reviews and evaluates approximate ALU techniques for VLSI designs, including truncated computation, speculative addition, and logic simplification. It frames accuracy loss through metrics such as mean error distance and error rate while comparing area, delay, and energy trade-offs. The result is most relevant for error-tolerant workloads such as multimedia, machine learning, and embedded signal processing, where lower switching activity can be worth bounded numerical error.
summary.zh: 这篇论文梳理并评估用于VLSI设计的近似ALU技术，包括截断计算、推测加法和逻辑简化。论文用平均误差距离、错误率等指标刻画精度损失，并比较面积、延迟和能耗权衡。其价值主要面向多媒体、机器学习和嵌入式信号处理等可容忍误差的工作负载，在这些场景中，降低开关活动可能值得接受受控数值误差。

title.en: A Scalable RISC-V Security Co-Processor for IoT
title.zh: 面向IoT的可扩展RISC-V安全协处理器

papers.authors: Mohamed Niazy, Haytham Azmi, M. M. Mahmoud

summary.en: The paper proposes a RISC-V-based cryptographic co-processor architecture for IoT devices, supporting AES-128 and SHA-256 without adding custom instructions to the base ISA. It uses memory-mapped I/O and DMA to move data between memory and cipher units without stalling the processor pipeline, and the design is implemented on a Xilinx ZCU-102 FPGA using Vivado 2022.2. The main significance is a modular security path for constrained devices that need hardware acceleration without fragmenting software compatibility.
summary.zh: 这篇论文提出一种面向IoT设备的RISC-V密码协处理器架构，在不向基础ISA添加自定义指令的情况下支持AES-128和SHA-256。设计使用MMIO和DMA在存储器与密码单元之间搬运数据，避免阻塞处理器流水线，并在Xilinx ZCU-102 FPGA上用Vivado 2022.2实现。其主要意义在于为资源受限设备提供模块化硬件安全加速，同时不破坏软件兼容性。

title.en: DPDK Architecture for 100 Gbps and Beyond Packet Processing
title.zh: 面向100Gbps及以上包处理的DPDK架构

summary.en: The article analyzes DPDK components such as EAL, poll-mode drivers, rte_mbuf, rte_mempool, rte_ring, and several packet-processing models for 100 Gbps-and-above systems. It highlights kernel bypass, zero-copy data paths, cache-optimized processing, and cryptographic protection through rte_security and cryptodev. The FPGA discussion makes it relevant for network accelerators where switching and inline encryption increasingly move closer to hardware.
summary.zh: 这篇文章分析DPDK在100Gbps及以上系统中的关键组件，包括EAL、轮询模式驱动、rte_mbuf、rte_mempool、rte_ring以及多种包处理模型。论文强调kernel bypass、zero-copy数据路径、缓存优化处理，以及通过rte_security和cryptodev实现的加密保护。其关于FPGA的讨论使其与网络加速器相关，因为交换和在线加密正越来越靠近硬件实现。

title.en: AI Accelerators & Edge Hardware
title.zh: AI加速器与边缘硬件

title.en: Risk-Guided Fault-Injection Prioritization for Systolic AI Accelerators
title.zh: 面向脉动阵列AI加速器的风险引导故障注入排序

summary.en: The paper proposes an architecture-level method to prioritize fault-injection candidates for systolic AI accelerators, targeting silent data corruption under limited validation budgets. Its evaluation scores the same 21,000 candidate faults across 30 workload, dataflow, and array configurations, including five GEMM-derived workloads, three array sizes, and two dataflows. The practical value is faster triage of MAC, accumulator, and forwarding-path vulnerabilities before expensive downstream validation.
summary.zh: 这篇论文提出一种架构级方法，用于在验证预算有限时对脉动阵列AI加速器的故障注入候选进行优先排序，目标是更有效发现静默数据损坏风险。评估在30种工作负载、数据流和阵列配置下，对同一组21,000个候选故障打分，其中包括5个源自GEMM的工作负载、3种阵列尺寸和2种数据流。其实际价值在于，在昂贵的后续验证之前，更快筛查MAC、累加器和转发路径的脆弱点。

title.en: Mixed-Signal CMOS VLSI Spiking Echo-State Network for Temporal Signals
title.zh: 用于时序信号处理的混合信号CMOS VLSI脉冲Echo-State网络

papers.authors: R. Nirmala, Malathi Murugesan, Sasikala Duraisamy, V. Senthilkumar

summary.en: The paper reports a mixed-signal CMOS VLSI implementation of a spiking echo-state neural network for energy-efficient temporal signal processing. The candidate feed does not include performance numbers, but the topic is relevant because reservoir-style spiking architectures can reduce digital memory movement for streaming signals. The key question for follow-up is whether measured silicon results show enough robustness and programmability for real edge workloads.
summary.zh: 这篇论文报告一种面向高能效时序信号处理的混合信号CMOS VLSI脉冲Echo-State神经网络实现。候选摘要未给出性能数字，但该方向重要，因为reservoir式脉冲架构有机会减少流式信号处理中的数字存储搬运。后续需要关注的是，实测硅片结果是否具备足够鲁棒性和可编程性，以支撑真实边缘工作负载。

title.en: Low-Power FPGA Real-Time Image Processing for Skin Cancer Detection
title.zh: 面向皮肤癌检测的低功耗FPGA实时图像处理架构

papers.authors: Venkata Reddy Adama, G. Koteswar Rao, K. Venugopal Rao
papers.venue: International Journal of Advanced Research in Science, Communication and Technology

summary.en: The paper proposes a low-power FPGA architecture for real-time skin-cancer image processing, combining acquisition, preprocessing, lesion segmentation, feature enhancement, lightweight CNN classification, and hardware acceleration. It targets portable screening systems where software-only deep learning can be limited by compute, memory, and power budgets. The listed abstract is architecture-focused, so measured latency, power, and diagnostic accuracy would determine how deployable the design is.
summary.zh: 这篇论文提出一种低功耗FPGA实时图像处理架构，用于皮肤癌检测，流程包括图像采集、预处理、病灶分割、特征增强、轻量级CNN分类和硬件加速。它面向便携筛查系统，因为纯软件深度学习往往受算力、存储和功耗预算限制。候选摘要偏架构描述，因此实测延迟、功耗和诊断准确率将决定该设计的可部署性。

title.en: EDA & Design Automation
title.zh: EDA与设计自动化

title.en: AI in Modern VLSI Chip Design: Opportunities and Challenges
title.zh: 现代VLSI芯片设计中的AI：机会与挑战

papers.venue: International Journal of Advanced Research in Science, Communication and Technology

summary.en: The paper surveys how AI and machine learning are entering the VLSI design lifecycle, from architectural exploration and floorplanning to physical verification and timing closure. It frames the benefit around power, performance, area, and time-to-market, while calling out data scarcity, black-box model behavior, and verification reliability as major obstacles. The paper is a useful checklist for where AI-EDA needs evidence, not just automation demos.
summary.zh: 这篇论文综述AI和机器学习如何进入VLSI设计流程，从架构探索、floorplanning到物理验证和时序收敛。论文把价值放在PPA优化和缩短上市时间上，同时指出数据稀缺、黑盒模型行为和验证可靠性是主要障碍。它更像是一份AI-EDA需要补齐证据的清单，而不只是自动化演示的集合。
